---
title: "raisd"
author: "Andrea Estandia"
date: "07/04/2026"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup}
# Knitr settings: 
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, eval = FALSE)
options(scipen = 999)
```

```{r}
source("./src/wm-europe_source.R")
```

```{r}
paths <- list.files(
  file.path(reports_path, "raisd"),
  pattern = "\\.clean\\.tsv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

df <- rbindlist(lapply(paths, function(p) {
  fname <- basename(p)
  
  pop <- sub("^RAiSD_Report\\.wm_", "", fname)
  pop <- sub("\\.clean\\.tsv$", "", pop)
  
  cbind(
    pop = pop,
    fread(p, col.names = c("chr", "position", "mu"))
  )
}))

```

```{r}

# order chromosomes once, globally
chr_levels <- df %>%
  distinct(chr) %>%
  mutate(chr_num = as.numeric(str_extract(chr, "\\d+"))) %>%
  arrange(chr_num, chr) %>%
  pull(chr)

prep_raisd <- function(dat) {
  dat <- dat %>%
    mutate(chr = factor(chr, levels = chr_levels)) %>%
    group_by(chr) %>%
    mutate(chr_start = min(position),
           chr_end   = max(position)) %>%
    ungroup()

  chr_df <- dat %>%
    distinct(chr, chr_start, chr_end) %>%
    arrange(chr) %>%
    mutate(chr_len = chr_end - chr_start,
           offset  = lag(cumsum(chr_len + 1), default = 0),
           center  = offset + chr_len / 2)

  dat %>%
    left_join(chr_df %>% select(chr, offset), by = "chr") %>%
    mutate(genome_pos = position - chr_start + offset) %>%
    list(data = ., axisdf = chr_df)
}

plot_raisd_pop <- function(dat, pop_name) {
  prep <- prep_raisd(dat)
  d <- prep$data
  axisdf <- prep$axisdf

  ggplot(d, aes(x = genome_pos, y = mu, col = chr)) +
    geom_point(size = 0.6, alpha = 0.8) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = axisdf$center,
      labels = gsub("chr", "", axisdf$chr),
      expand = c(0.01, 0.01)
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = rep(c("#2C3E50", "#95A5A6"), length.out = nrow(axisdf))) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
      axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
      text = element_text(family = "roboto_condensed", size = 16),
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "\nChromosome",
      y = "mu\n",
      title = paste("RAiSD:", pop_name)
    )
}

plots <- lapply(split(df, df$pop), function(d) {
  plot_raisd_pop(d, unique(d$pop))
})

ggsave(
  wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 1),
  filename = file.path(figures_path, "raisd", "raisd_plot.png"),
  width = 8,
  height = 12
)
```
